sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51073" key="i)so/lektoi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσό-λεκτοι</orth> <sense id="n51073.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">versus, antithetically composed</tr_>, Diom.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1596.tlg001:p.498" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.498</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
